description: Color photograph, horizontal, of two workers, with no overlaid graphic text, slogans, or agency seals. The setting is the interior of a warehouse or fabrication shop with dim, warm lighting and metal structural columns in the background (one marked '34 5'). Two men stand talking and looking off to the side: at left a lighter-skinned man with blond hair wearing a dark navy ball cap (a Peterbilt-style oval logo), clear safety glasses, and a soiled, dirt-smudged off-white t-shirt; at right a Black man wearing a dark Reebok ball cap, clear safety glasses pushed up, a silver chain necklace, and a light gray zip-up hoodie that has a printed raven/bird graphic with small text near the hem. The tweet text refers to 'American Workers First.' The only text is the brand logos on their hats and the faint print on the hoodie.
notable_text: (no overlaid graphic text; only apparel branding: Peterbilt-style cap, Reebok cap)
